meta.title: LOGOS.ai
meta.description: Turn any video into a blog post — auto-convert Shorts/Reels into SEO-optimized Naver blog articles

onboarding.subtitle: What can we help you with?

card1.title: Video to Blog
card1.desc: Just paste a YouTube Shorts or Instagram Reels link and get a Naver blog post

card2.title: Instagram Feed to Blog
card2.desc: Paste an Instagram photo post link and it auto-converts to an SEO blog post

promo.banner: 🎉 Launch Special: 48-hour free event! Unlimited free use with login — Time left:

videoToBlog.desc:
Just paste a Shorts/Reels link and AI auto-converts it into an SEO-optimized Naver blog post.
1/10 the cost of a blog agency, done in under 1 minute. The blog automation tool for business owners.

feedToBlog.desc:
Just paste an Instagram photo post link and AI auto-converts it into an SEO-optimized Naver blog post.
Supports single photos to carousels — even image-only posts with no text.

blogToVideo.desc:
Paste your blog content and AI auto-converts it into a 15-second Reels/Shorts video.
LOGOS AI analyzes your blog content and creates engaging vertical videos.

convert.feedDesc: Supports single photos to carousels · image-only posts OK
convert.blogToVideoDesc: LOGOS AI auto-generates a 15-second vertical video

features.label: Features
features.title: See what you can do
features.subtitle: Videos, feeds, PDFs — AI transforms any content into valuable blog posts

blog.leftTitle: One video, one complete blog post
blog.leftDesc: Paste a YouTube Shorts or Instagram Reels link and get an SEO-optimized Naver blog post automatically.
blog.rightDesc: Subheadings, emojis, hashtags — auto-generates a format optimized for top search rankings.

study.leftDesc: Upload a YouTube video or PDF and get study notes with key concepts, detailed summaries, and practice questions.
study.rightDesc: Concepts sorted by importance with custom practice questions for efficient learning.

feed.leftDesc: Paste an Instagram photo post link and AI analyzes images and captions to create an SEO blog post.
feed.rightDesc: Single photos to carousels, even image-only posts — AI analyzes and writes search-optimized content.

problem.title: Business Owner Struggles
problem.subtitle: You create great video content, but finding time for blog marketing feels impossible.
problem.cat1: Posts videos but can't keep up with blogging
problem.cat2: Needs blog marketing but doesn't know where to start

items1.quote: "I have no time to write blog posts"
items1.desc: Running a store all day leaves zero time for managing a blog.
points: Running the store takes all day

items1.desc: Blog management costs $300-500/month... too much for small business owners.
points: Monthly fixed costs are a burden
Hard to tell if it's effective

items1.quote: "I shoot videos but can't turn them into posts"
items1.desc: I upload Shorts and Reels, but turning the same content into blog posts is a whole different task.
Blogging requires consistency, but even posting once a week is a struggle.
points: One post takes over an hour

items2.quote: "My blog doesn't show up in search"
items2.desc: I have a blog, but it never ranks high enough to drive traffic.
points: Don't know how to rank higher

items2.desc: Writing myself feels awkward, and agency posts don't capture my brand voice.
Nearby businesses grow with blog marketing while I'm falling behind.
points: I know I need to do it too...

items2.desc: Great content lives on Shorts/Reels, but I don't know how to recycle it for blogs.
points: Videos and blogs are separate efforts

items.title: Speech to text, accurately

items.title: Blog structure search engines love
items.desc: Auto-generates subheadings, emojis, and paragraph layouts optimized for top search rankings.

items.title: Perfect tone for your industry
items.desc: Applies natural blog writing styles tailored to your business — gyms, restaurants, academies, and more.

items.title: 1/10 the cost of an agency
items.desc: Skip the $300+/month agency fees. Starting at just $0.50 per post — focus on your business.

items.title: One link, one minute, done
items.desc: No complex setup — just paste a video URL and your blog post is ready.

pricing.title: Pricing
